options.name: --bundle
options.description: Bundle name and version separate by :/v/V (ex: HOPEX:6.2.0.0

options.name: --server-token
options.description:
Module store token - (env var = HAS_STORE_TOKEN)
--module            Module package to commit (format=name@version)
--agent             Agent version to commit
--installer         Installer version to commit
--save-commit-to    Save commit results into file
--server            Server version to commit
--daily-bundle      Is daily version of bundle
--new-bundle        New bundle version

options.name: --path
options.description: Module path (Project folder to build or file to publish)

options.name: --server-token
options.description:
Module store token - (env var = HAS_STORE_TOKEN)
--force-publish             Force publish with same version
--commit-to                 Bundle name to commit the package
--daily-bundle              Is daily version of bundle
--save-commit-to            Save commit results into file
--dry-run                   Do not create the package
--certificate-file          Path and name of the certificate file to use
--certificate-password      Password that protects the certificate file
--certificate-subject       Subject of the certificate that is stored in the certificate machine store, in 'my' (aka 'Personal') location.
--certificate-user-store    Use the certificate user store instead of the machine store
--kvc                       Name of the certificate in Azure Keyvault
--kvi                       Identifier of the client in Azure
--kvs                       Secret associated with the client id
--kvu                       URL of the KeyVault where the certificate is stored
--kvt                       Tenant Identifier associated to the Azure client
Create options only :

options.name: --version
options.description:
Package version
--configuration             Build configuration (Default: Release)
--copy-to                   Target package folder
--output-file               Target package file. (Override --copy-to option)
--manifest                  Manifest path to use (can be a physical or http url)
--publish                   Try to publish a module using user context (from env. var.)
--no-build                  Do not build before

options.name: --path
options.description:
Zip to publish
--force-publish     Force publish with same version
--commit-to         Bundle name to commit the package
--save-commit-to    Save commit results into file
--daily-bundle      Is daily version of bundle

options.name: --server-address
options.description:
HAS cluster address (eg. https://....)
--password          Admin password
--get               Get a settings values (Valid values are 'settings' and 'hopexpath'
--set               Key value pair to update on the form section.key=value (Enclose all pair with '"' if value contains blank character)
